hero_headline: Hey, I'm the person behind Cookie Digital.
hero_sub: Just one developer, based in the NY tri-state area, who genuinely enjoys building things that help small businesses succeed online.
story_p1: I started Cookie Digital because I kept seeing small businesses in the area get burned — agencies charging too much, disappearing mid-project, or handing over something generic.
story_p2: So I went independent. Now you work directly with me, start to finish. No account managers, no handoffs, no "that's out of scope" for small stuff.
story_p3: I've been building websites for years and I genuinely love it. Taking someone's rough idea and turning it into something they're proud to show people — that never gets old.
location_text: I'm based in the NY tri-state area and primarily work with businesses in New York, New Jersey, and Connecticut. That said, I'm happy to work with anyone — location has never stopped a good project.
working_text: You'll always know what's going on. I'll respond quickly and won't leave you hanging. If something's going to take longer than expected, you'll hear from me before you have to ask.
